criteria.label: Evidence honesty
criteria.full_credit: Labels the input as static and avoids smoothness or runtime claims.

criteria.label: Motion necessity
criteria.full_credit: Separates causal feedback from decorative or unnecessary animation.

criteria.label: Direct manipulation
criteria.full_credit: Catches input lockout, pointer capture, grab offset, and one-to-one tracking.

criteria.label: Interruption and presentation value
criteria.full_credit: Requires interruption from the current on-screen value without jumps.

criteria.label: Velocity and projection
criteria.full_credit: Preserves release velocity, units, projected endpoints, and snap selection.

criteria.label: Property and performance discipline
criteria.full_credit: Rejects layout-property motion, transition-all, and conflicting transform ownership.

criteria.label: Accessibility
criteria.full_credit: Defines a non-vestibular Reduced Motion path with preserved feedback.

criteria.label: Actionability and scope
criteria.full_credit: Gives prioritized implementation moves and a minimal runtime plan within the output budget.
